plugins.name: escc
plugins.description: EverythingSales Claude Code (ESCC) - a sales harness for SDRs, AEs, Sales Managers, and RevOps. Skills-first content, profile-gated hooks, instinct-based continuous learning, session/context persistence, and a CI-enforced quality pipeline. Adapted from Everything Claude Code (MIT).
